name: Silicon Graphics, Inc. (SGI)
description: Silicon Graphics, Inc. (SGI) was an American high-performance computing manufacturer that specialized in producing advanced computer hardware, supercomputers, and graphics software. Founded in 1981 and headquartered in Mountain View, California, the company became renowned for its powerful workstations that revolutionized 3D graphics, visual effects, and scientific visualization. SGI's technology was widely utilized in industries ranging from entertainment and film production to aerospace and defense. Although the company faced significant challenges in the evolving computing market and eventually ceased independent operations, its legacy remains influential in the development of modern computer graphics and high-performance computing architectures.
